allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const mongoose = require\('mongoose'\); mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGO_URI\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('DB Connected OK'\); console.log\('readyState:', mongoose.connection.readyState\); console.log\('host:', mongoose.connection.host\); console.log\('poolSize \(default\):', mongoose.connection.pool?.size ?? 'N/A'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('DB Error:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
